title: Temporal Fragility Mapping: Aligning CRISPR-Cure-7 Editing to Cell Cinema-Predicted DTP Commitment Windows in Metastatic Cancer
research_goal: Generate the next CancerHawk block: identify a focused oncology research direction that builds on the prior CRISPR-Cure-7 and Cell Cinema blocks, then produce a publishable paper, peer review, simulations, and next-topic seeds.
